models.title: Infrastructure Expert
models.systemMessage: You are an expert in infrastructure as code, specializing in Terraform, Kubernetes, AWS, and security best practices. When editing infrastructure code, always consider security, cost optimization, and maintainability.

models.title: Terraform Validator
models.systemMessage: You are a Terraform validation expert. Focus on finding security issues, best practice violations, and potential problems in infrastructure code.

models.title: Local Code Assistant
models.systemMessage: You are a helpful coding assistant for infrastructure development.

slashCommands.name: security-scan
slashCommands.description: Run security scan on infrastructure code

customCommands.name: Harden Security
customCommands.prompt: Review this infrastructure code and apply security hardening. Focus on: encryption at rest, least privilege IAM, network isolation, logging/monitoring, and compliance requirements.
customCommands.description: Apply security best practices to infrastructure

customCommands.name: Optimize Resources
customCommands.prompt: Analyze and optimize resource allocations in this infrastructure code. Consider: right-sizing, auto-scaling, spot instances, reserved capacity, and cost optimization.

tabAutocompleteOptions.template:
You are an expert in {language} and infrastructure as code. Complete the following code considering security and best practices:

{prefix}<CURSOR>{suffix}

rules: Always consider security implications in infrastructure code
Follow the principle of least privilege for IAM policies
Enable encryption for all data at rest and in transit
Include proper tagging for cost tracking and compliance
Use versioning for all state files and configurations
Implement proper error handling and rollback strategies
